stories.headline: Bijan's Payday Rides In: Atlanta Fixin' to Make Him Richest Back in the Territory
stories.read: Well pardner, the wire says Atlanta's about to back up the money wagon for Bijan Robinson, with an extension expected soon that could push him past Saquon as the highest-paid back in the land. The suits who rank these fellas already stamped him the No. 1 runner headin' into 2026, nudgin' out Gibbs, after he hauled 287 totes for 1,478 yards and First-Team All-Pro honors. Here's the read: that paper just confirms the whole ranch is his, no timeshare, no committee, no holdout drama muddyin' the water. Draft him first off the board and don't flinch, because a locked-in bell-cow is the surest gold on the trail.

stories.headline: Lamar Calls Zay Flowers 'Out of This World' While the Saloon Sleeps on Him
stories.read: Hold up there, this one's a vein worth pannin'. Lamar Jackson stood at minicamp and said Flowers' value is 'out of this world, we need Zay,' and the numbers back the boast, a 1,211-yard season that ate up near 37 percent of Baltimore's throws and a WR7 finish. The only fool's-gold worry is paydirt luck, he's never crossed five receiving scores, and there's a new play-caller in Declan Doyle callin' the shots. But you're gettin' a No. 1 ceiling at a No. 2 price on the great land grab, pardner. Cheap gold, go pan that creek before your outfit strikes it.

stories.headline: Skattebo's Back in the Saddle: A Giants Workhorse the Herd's Too Spooked to Grab
stories.read: Now here's your diamond in the rough. Cam Skattebo took a nasty spill last October, a dislocated ankle in Week 8, but he's already runnin' 11-on-11 at OTAs and sittin' atop the Giants' pecking order over Tyrone Tracy come camp. Folks forget that in Weeks 2 through 7, when they handed him the reins full-time, he was the RB8 in points per game on 19.5 touches a Sunday. The whole saloon's still gun-shy about the busted wheel, so he's droppin' to a bargain, and volume is king out here. Stake a claim at that RB2 price, because if the ankle holds, this fella's fixin' to gush.
